creator: glarkin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->analyzed

Hi Pavel, 

Instead of using a script to perform the fetch, would you mind creating 
a distfile from the 3 source files and placing it somewhere for download? 
The distfile name should also contain a version string that corresponds to 
PORTVERSION.  This way, users with different versions of the port Makefile 
can still install successfully as the upstream source files change. 

If you don't have a download server available, let me know, and I will be 
happy to place the distfile on the FreeBSD regional FTP servers for you. 
In this case, use this in your Makefile: 

MASTER_SITES=	LOCAL/glarkin 

Thank you, 
Greg
